name: pi-fallow
description: Pi extension that brings Fallow codebase intelligence into Pi as an agent tool and slash command.
author: Revaz Zakalashvili

scripts.check: npm run check:bundle && npm run health
scripts.check:bundle: npx -y esbuild extensions/fallow.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --external:@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent --external:@earendil-works/pi-tui --external:@earendil-works/pi-ai --external:typebox --outdir=/tmp/pi-fallow-esbuild && npx -y esbuild extensions/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --external:@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent --external:@earendil-works/pi-tui --external:@earendil-works/pi-ai --external:typebox --outdir=/tmp/pi-fallow-esbuild
